summary: Comprehensive testing of Chain of Custody and Wallet Linkage features. All core functionality verified: Login, Chain of Custody modal, Review Queue with Mine/External/Skip buttons, Linkages tab, Tax tab with Form 8949 export. Backend: 14/14 tests pass. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 for invalid decision - error message is correct but wrapped in 500 response

critical_code_review_comments: Error handling in resolve-review endpoint could be improved to return proper 400 status for validation errors instead of wrapping in 500
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chain of Custody and Wallet Linkage features fully tested. Review Queue has 323 pending items. User has 37 linkages and 2 tax events. Form 8949 CSV export working correctly with proper IRS format columns.

features_verified.login_flow: PASS - Login with test credentials works correctly
features_verified.chain_of_custody_modal: PASS - Opens from dashboard via 'Chain of Custody' button
features_verified.wallet_linkage_manager: PASS - Opens via 'Wallet Linkage' button in modal
features_verified.review_queue_tab: PASS - Shows pending items with Mine/External/Skip buttons
features_verified.resolve_as_mine: PASS - Creates wallet linkage, shows success message
features_verified.resolve_as_external: PASS - Creates tax event with Form 8949 data
features_verified.linkages_tab: PASS - Shows created linkages with confidence scores
features_verified.tax_tab: PASS - Shows tax events with gain/loss, has Load button
features_verified.export_form_8949: PASS - Downloads CSV with proper IRS format columns
